tech_stack: React Native + Expo (expo-router, expo start web)

features.name: Routing & Navigation (expo-router)
features.description: File-based routing for staff/supervisor/admin flows and shared screens like login/register/notifications.

features.name: Authentication API Client
features.description: HTTP calls for login/register/token and related auth API helpers.

features.name: Session Management API Client
features.description: Session CRUD and related endpoints for supervisor/staff workflows.

features.name: Item Verification API Client
features.description: Endpoints for verifying items and managing count lines / verification workflow.

features.name: Admin APIs
features.description: Admin endpoints: users, control panel, exports, analytics, and operational dashboards.

features.name: Supervisor Dashboard & Realtime
features.description: Supervisor dashboard UI and realtime updates via WebSocket events and query invalidation.

features.name: Offline Queue & Unified Sync Storage
features.description: Queue offline operations and flush when online, with retry/backoff and conflict handling.

features.name: Background Sync
features.description: Background/periodic sync integration for queued operations.

features.name: Network Awareness
features.description: Connectivity detection and network state integration for sync behavior.

features.name: Persistent Storage Abstractions
features.description: AsyncStorage and SecureStore wrappers for tokens/settings and other persisted state.

features.name: State Management (Zustand Stores)
features.description: Client-side state stores for auth, settings, notifications, scanning, filters and offline mode.

features.name: Theming
features.description: Theme context/provider and theme utilities used by UI components.

features.name: UI Component Library
features.description: Reusable UI components used throughout the app (buttons, cards, headers, modals, etc.).

features.name: Scanning Workflow
features.description: Staff scanning screens and utilities for deduplication and scan feedback.

features.name: Monitoring & Diagnostics
features.description: Performance monitoring and self-test utilities for diagnosing runtime issues.

features.name: Testing Setup (Unit/Component)
features.description: Jest + Testing Library configuration and representative tests for services and screens.
